name: get_client_guardrails
description: Retrieve the pre-generation guardrails for a client. Returns forbidden words (never use), required terminology (always prefer), voice description, competitor mentions policy, and compliance notes. This tool is called AUTOMATICALLY by the orchestrator before content generation — you don't need to call it manually unless you need to check a specific guardrail mid-task.

client_id.description: UUID of the client whose guardrails to fetch.
